name: Chocolate Buttermilk Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F. Butter an lightly flour two 8-inch round cake pans or one 9"X13-inch pan. Mix the flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda and salt in a bowl. Add the buttermilk, vegetable oil and vanilla, beating until smooth. Spread in the pans or pan, and bake for 20-25 minutes for the small pans, 35-45 minutes for the large one. Test to see if a toothpick comes out clean. Cool for 5 minutes in the pan before turning out onto a rack. Frost with a light chocolate frosting.
